title: chore: version packages (alpha)
summary: Automated Changesets release PR that bumps alpha pre-release versions across ~97 packages in the monorepo. This is the latest in a series of recurring 'version packages (alpha)' PRs generated by the Changesets GitHub action. The repo is in pre-release mode. Packages being bumped include @mastra/core (1.11.0-alpha.0), @mastra/server (1.11.0-alpha.0), @mastra/playground-ui (16.0.0-alpha.0), and dozens of other packages. Changes are exclusively version bumps in package.json files and auto-generated CHANGELOG.md entries.
maintainerNotes: Two CI checks are failing: 'Full Test Suite' (some tests failed or were cancelled) and 'Observability Package Tests'. E2E Tests and Memory Tests are still pending. Previous similar PR #13875 was merged on the same day this was opened, so this PR represents the next batch of accumulated changesets. The CI failures should be investigated before merging — they may be flaky tests or genuine regressions from recent main branch changes. Socket Security flagged license policy warnings (CC-BY-4.0 for caniuse-lite and argparse) but these are transitive dependency warnings, not actionable blockers.
